title: DGFT Strengthens FTP to Prohibit Forced Labour Goods Imports
content:
# DGFT Strengthens FTP to Prohibit Forced Labour Goods Imports

Ek important update hai. Government ne India ke Foreign Trade Policy (FTP) 2023 ko aur strong banate hue, forced labour se bane goods ke import par rok lagane ka announce kiya hai.

Yahan kuch key points hain:

*   **Kya Badla Hai:** Ab India mein aise goods ka import prohibited hoga jo poore ya partly, forced labour ka use karke banaye gaye hain.
*   **Kab Se Lagu Hoga:** Yeh naye rules Official Gazette mein notification publish hone ke 30 din baad effect mein aayenge.
*   **Naya Mechanism:** Central Government time-to-time specific goods ko notify kar sakti hai jinhe prohibited kiya jayega, DGFT ki enquiry findings ke baad.
*   **Forced Labour Ki Definition:** "Forced Labour" ki definition ILO Forced Labour Convention, 1930 (No. 29) ke according hogi.
*   **Notification Details:** Yeh provisions DGFT Notification No. 23/2026-27, dated July 13, 2026, ke through introduce kiye gaye hain.

## Read the Official Document
*   [Download the Official Notification/Circular here](https://dgft.gov.in/sites/default/files/notification/Notification%20No%2023%20dated%2013-07-2026.pdf)

*Published on: 17 July 2026*
